title: rubus × deflexidens
intro: Rubus × deflexidens, a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry plants, is a type of flowering shrub native to Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which is responsible for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × deflexidens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
